# Arcane Hive

> Dhaka-based technology company delivering Software, IoT, and AI development with a singular focus: operational efficiency and measurable ROI for Bangladesh's established businesses and international partners. Founded 2017. We don't just build tech, we protect your profit.

## Services
- Software Development: retail modernization, digital commerce, inventory management, localized logistics
- IoT Solutions: smart monitoring for warehouses and factories, theft prevention, energy optimization, real-time asset visibility
- AI Integration: call-center automation and reliable high-volume customer operations
- Digital AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract): ongoing software management, security patching, and performance upkeep

## Pages
- [Home](https://arcane-hive.com/): company overview, the Arcane Standard, delivered portfolio, leadership
- [Projects](https://arcane-hive.com/projects/): full delivered portfolio across web platforms, IoT devices, mobility solutions, and business solutions
- [Team](https://arcane-hive.com/team/): leadership and team profiles

## Selected delivered work
- Web platforms: Fanmire.com (international), Bongshal.com (Bangladesh marketplace), Zabai.no (Europe)
- IoT devices: AI-Integrated Juice Cart (WellSpring), Spice Sun-Drying Machine (iFarmer/BARI/DAM), AI Desk Assistant
- Mobility: EV Ride-Sharing App (Jaiben), EV Battery-Swap Conversion, EV Delivery Van R&D (Daraz/DigiBox)
- Business: Kiosk & POS Software, AI-Enabled CRM, Handheld Payment Solutions
